mapper.select: SELECT budget_id, year_month, total_budget, created_at, updated_at, user_id FROM projectdb.budgets WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY year_month DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.budgets (year_month, total_budget, user_id) VALUES (#{yearMonth}, #{totalBudget}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE projectdb.budgets SET total_budget = #{totalBudget}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE budget_id = #{budgetId}
mapper.select: SELECT cb.cat_budget_id, cb.year_month, cb.budget_amount, cb.created_at, cb.user_id, cb.category_id, c.name as category_name FROM projectdb.category_budgets cb LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON cb.category_id = c.category_id WHERE cb.user_id = #{userId} AND cb.year_month = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY cb.budget_amount DESC

SELECT cb.cat_budget_id, cb.year_month, cb.budget_amount, cb.created_at, cb.user_id, cb.category_id, c.name as category_name FROM projectdb.category_budgets cb LEFT JOIN projectdb.categories c ON cb.category_id = c.category_id WHERE cb.user_id = #{userId} AND cb.year_month = #{yearMonth} AND cb.category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.category_budgets (year_month, budget_amount, user_id, category_id) VALUES (#{yearMonth}, #{budgetAmount}, #{userId}, #{categoryId})
